Major Tohoku festivals like Sendai Tanabata, Akita Kanto, Yamagata Hanagasa, and Morioka Sansa are entirely absent. The Korean language requirement (lang=ko) was respected. Per Rule C, the Aomori data returned is authoritative but the coverage gap is severe — only 1/6 prefectures covered with 2 items, while the national_heritage list is mostly off-region. This is primarily a coverage failure.
